sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Contango ORE (NYSE American: CTGO) holders approve Dolly Varden deal, big share increase
feed.summary: Contango ORE, Inc. stockholders overwhelmingly approved key proposals related to its acquisition of Dolly Varden Silver Corporation, including issuing shares to Dolly Varden shareholders and increasing the authorized common shares from 45 million to 250 million. The acquisition, which involves an exchange ratio of 0.1652 Contango shares for each Dolly Varden share, awaits final approval from the British Columbia Supreme Court on March 23, 2026. Shareholder turnout was robust, with approximately 66% of outstanding shares represented at the special meeting.

feed.title: CSCL Stock Fund Price and Chart — NASDAQ:CSCL
feed.summary: This article provides detailed information on the Direxion Daily CSCO Bull 2X ETF (CSCL), including its price, chart data, key statistics like AUM and expense ratio, and issuer details. It explains that CSCL is a leveraged ETF designed to deliver 2x the daily price return of Cisco Systems, Inc. (CSCO) and offers insights into its performance, holdings, and technical analysis.

feed.title: Rochester Township residents frustrated with smell from Sherwin-Williams plant: "Stop poisoning us"
feed.summary: Residents of Rochester Township are expressing severe frustration and concern over persistent chemical odors believed to be emanating from the local Sherwin-Williams manufacturing plant. They describe the smell as a harsh chemical paint odor, which they claim has worsened over years, leading to fears of long-term health effects from air pollutants. Tests conducted by a resident showed high levels of VOCs in a nearby home, prompting the township to consider legal action if state environmental agencies do not intervene effectively.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Squibb Kidney Cancer Trial Tests Valuation And Pipeline Depth
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb has initiated a Phase 1 clinical trial for BMS-986506, a CELMoD agent for clear cell renal cell carcinoma, in collaboration with Evotec. This marks an expansion of the company's protein degradation platform into kidney cancer. Investors are monitoring the trial's early safety and activity data, as well as the company's valuation, which currently trades below analyst targets and Simply Wall St's fair value estimate despite mixed stock performance over recent years.

feed.title: Trimble Inc. wins awards for company outlook diversity and support for women
feed.summary: Trimble Inc. has been recognized with awards for its company outlook, diversity, and support for women, based on employee surveys conducted by Comparably. These accolades underscore Trimble's dedication to fostering an inclusive work environment and its broader commitment to culture and innovation, including efforts to streamline project delivery and engage in high-profile partnerships. The company's achievements align with its ongoing initiatives to integrate core platforms and support ventures like Chris Buescher's return to NASCAR.

feed.title: Cellectis says its leukemia cell therapy hit 100% response in target group
feed.summary: Cellectis reported its full-year 2025 financial results and provided a business update, highlighting clinical success and a cash runway into H2 2027. The company's lead product, lasme-cel, achieved a 100% overall response rate in the target Phase 2 population for B-ALL, with a BLA submission anticipated in 2028. Eti-cel, for non-Hodgkin lymphoma, also showed strong efficacy with an 88% overall response rate.

feed.title: CGMS ETF Analysis: Dividends, Returns AMEX:CGMS
feed.summary: This article provides an in-depth analysis of the Capital Group U.S. Multi-Sector Income ETF (CGMS), highlighting its dividend yield of 6.07% and AUM of $4.50 billion. It details the ETF's investment strategy, which focuses on various debt instruments including high-yield and investment-grade corporate bonds, and securitized debt. The fund is actively managed and primarily allocates to the North American region, with its expense ratio at 0.39%.

It allocates across five US broad fixed-income sectors using a proprietary methodology and tracks the Morningstar US Bond Market Yield-Optimized Index. The article provides detailed financial data, allocation, performance, and answers frequently asked questions about the ETF.

feed.title: Canadian Solar posts $1.2 billion in Q4 revenue, missing analyst targets
feed.summary: Canadian Solar reported Q4 2025 revenue of $1.2 billion, falling short of analyst expectations, which led to a 26% drop in its share price. The company experienced a net loss of $86 million in Q4 and $104 million for the full year, attributed to lower storage volumes, delayed project sales, and asset impairment charges. Despite these setbacks, Canadian Solar achieved record annual shipments to the U.S. market, diversified its profit drivers with significant growth in energy storage, and is expanding its manufacturing capabilities in North America.

feed.title: 3M, DuPont Hit With RICO Suit Over PFAS In Firefighter Gear
feed.summary: San Mateo County has filed a proposed class action RICO suit against chemical companies including 3M, Chemours, and DuPont de Nemours. The suit alleges these companies provided firefighters with protective gear containing "hazardous levels" of PFAS.

feed.title: Tesla in talks with Chinese firms to buy $2.9 billion worth of solar equipment, sources say
feed.summary: Tesla is reportedly in discussions with Chinese suppliers, including Suzhou Maxwell Technologies, to purchase $2.9 billion worth of equipment for manufacturing solar panels and cells. This move supports CEO Elon Musk's goal to add 100 gigawatts of solar capacity in the United States by 2028. The potential deal highlights the U.S.'s continued reliance on Chinese trade for manufacturing, even as it aims to bolster domestic production.

feed.title: Crunchyroll accused of sharing users’ video viewing data without consent
feed.summary: Crunchyroll is facing a class action lawsuit for allegedly violating the Video Privacy Protection Act (VPPA) by sharing users' video viewing data with a third-party marketing company, Braze Inc., without obtaining explicit consent. Lead plaintiff Francisco Cabonios and others claim Crunchyroll embedded Braze's software to transmit personally identifiable information, including email addresses and video titles. The lawsuit seeks $2,500 in statutory damages per violation for users whose privacy was breached.

feed.title: [Form 4] Bumble Inc. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Blackstone-affiliated entities, identified as 10% owners of Bumble Inc. (BMBL), have reported disposing of 7,477,504 shares of Class A common stock at $3.51 per share on March 17, 2026. These transactions were conducted through various holding vehicles via a post-paid forward agreement with an unaffiliated financial institution. Despite these sales, the reporting persons retain substantial indirect holdings in Bumble.

feed.title: BofA Finance $5M Autocallable Notes (NYSE: BAC) tied to Russell 2000
feed.summary: BofA Finance LLC is offering $5,000,000 in Autocallable Notes linked to the Russell 2000 Index, due March 22, 2029, and fully guaranteed by Bank of America Corporation (BAC). These notes carry significant risks, including the potential for 100% loss of principal if not automatically called, and are subject to the creditworthiness of BofA Finance and BAC. The notes feature annual observation dates, an automatic call if the underlying level exceeds the initial value, and a fixed Call Return Rate of 15.75% per annum.

feed.title: L3 Harris: A 7.1 Rating in the Competitive Defense Sector
feed.summary: Motley Fool analysts discuss L3Harris Technologies (NYSE: LHX) in a Scoreboard episode, providing insights into market trends and investment opportunities. The article highlights that while L3Harris wasn't chosen as one of their top 10 stocks, the "Stock Advisor" team has a strong track record of identifying high-growth companies. It also mentions a report on a "little-known company" providing critical AI technology.

feed.title: How Mixed EPS Trends And Ethical Honors At Principal (PFG) Have Changed Its Investment Story
feed.summary: Principal Financial Group recently reported Q4 adjusted earnings per share below analyst expectations, yet management projects a 9-12% full-year EPS growth. Simultaneously, the company was recognized as one of the 2026 World's Most Ethical Companies for the fifteenth time, highlighting its strong culture and governance. This blend of cautious financial outlook and ethical recognition suggests that while short-term challenges remain, the company's long-term investment story is supported by its perceived integrity and ability to attract higher-quality business.

feed.title: Biohaven (NASDAQ: BHVN) director reports gifting 34,684 shares, adds family trust
feed.summary: Biohaven Ltd. director Kishan Mehta reported bona fide gift transfers of 34,684 common shares on March 17, 2026. One transfer of 17,342 shares reduced his directly held stake to 5,320 common shares. The remaining 17,342 shares were transferred to the "Kishen Mehta 21 Family Irrevocable Trust," with Mehta disclaiming beneficial ownership of these securities.

feed.title: How Investors Are Reacting To C.H. Robinson (CHRW) Supercharging Its Lean AI Logistics Engine
feed.summary: C.H. Robinson Worldwide has expanded its Lean AI operating system, leveraging over 100 trillion logistics data points to automate tasks and improve execution speed and reliability. This AI enhancement strengthens the company's non-asset-based logistics model against potential challenges from digital marketplaces. While it may provide efficiency and service differentiation, investors are still weighing the impact on margins amidst intensifying digital freight competition.

feed.title: Salesforce Fiscal 2026 Results: AI Agent Platform Drives Growth - News and Statistics
feed.summary: Salesforce reported strong financial results for its fiscal year ending January 2026, with revenue increasing 10% to $41.5 billion. The company's AI Agentforce platform was a significant growth driver, achieving an annual revenue run rate of $800 million and being included in over three-quarters of large transactions when combined with the Data 360 platform. Major clients like Wyndham Hotels and SharkNinja have successfully deployed these AI tools, demonstrating their real-world utility and Salesforce's strategy of building an integrated system of enterprise data, applications, and AI agents.

feed.title: Cboe Global Markets Stock: Good Hedge For High Volatility (BATS:CBOE)
feed.summary: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) has developed proprietary products that serve as crucial tools for investors during periods of high market uncertainty and volatility. The company is largely insulated from geopolitical events and supply chain disruptions due to its asset-light business model, which primarily generates revenue from licensing its franchise assets and trading activities. This positioning makes Cboe a strong candidate for hedging against market fluctuations.

feed.title: Omnicom Interpublic Deal Reshapes Agencies With Synergies And Job Cuts
feed.summary: Omnicom Group has finalized its $13 billion acquisition of Interpublic Group, leading to a significant restructuring plan that includes 4,000 job cuts and agency brand consolidations. The merged entity aims to achieve $1.5 billion in annual cost synergies, with $900 million targeted for 2026, positioning itself as a larger, more diversified marketing-services group. Investors are urged to monitor client retention, cost savings, and the execution risk associated with merging two global companies amidst broader market uncertainties.

feed.title: BofA Finance (BAC) prices callable notes with 11.25% contingent coupon
feed.summary: BofA Finance LLC, guaranteed by Bank of America Corporation (BAC), has priced 9-month callable yield notes with a contingent coupon of 11.25% per annum. The notes are linked to the S&P 500®, iShares MSCI ACWI ETF, and iShares MSCI Emerging Markets ETF, and are callable monthly starting April 23, 2026. Holders face leveraged downside risk if the least performing underlying falls below 80% of its starting value, potentially losing up to 100% of principal.

feed.title: Phoenix Financial Ltd. Reduces Stake in Caesarstone Ltd.
feed.summary: Phoenix Financial Ltd. has reduced its stake in Caesarstone Ltd. (CSTE) by selling over 2.1 million shares at $0.8102 per share, impacting its portfolio by -0.02%. This strategic move leaves Phoenix Financial with 1.58 million shares in Caesarstone, a company facing significant financial challenges evident from its low GF Score, negative ROE, and poor growth rankings. The transaction highlights the investment firm's reassessment of Caesarstone's future prospects, signaling caution for potential investors.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Paul Oldham Sells Shares of Advanced Energy Indust
feed.summary: Advanced Energy Industries Inc's (AEIS) Executive Vice President and CFO, Paul Oldham, sold 4,314 shares of the company on March 18, 2026. Following this transaction, Oldham now owns 22,217 shares. The stock is currently trading at $315.99, making its price-to-GF-Value ratio 2.54, indicating it is significantly overvalued according to GuruFocus.

feed.title: Insider Sell: Paul Maleh Sells 7,500 Shares of CRA International Inc (CRAI)
feed.summary: Paul Maleh, President and CEO of CRA International Inc (CRAI), sold 7,500 shares of the company on March 17, 2026. This transaction continues a trend of insider selling for Maleh, who has sold 40,000 shares in the past year without any purchases. Despite the insider selling, CRA International Inc is currently considered modestly undervalued, with a price-to-GF-Value ratio of 0.8.

feed.title: Abbott Acquisition Of Exact Sciences Refocuses Growth On Cancer Diagnostics
feed.summary: Abbott Laboratories has announced its acquisition of Exact Sciences, a strategic move to significantly expand its presence and growth in cancer diagnostics. This acquisition aims to strengthen Abbott's diagnostics portfolio by integrating Exact Sciences' cancer testing capabilities, aligning with Abbott's focus on large chronic-disease markets like cancer, diabetes, and cardiovascular care. The success of this deal will depend on integration, but it positions Abbott for future growth in the advanced diagnostics sector, albeit with potential challenges related to competition and integration costs.

feed.title: ZVOL ETF Analysis: Dividends, Returns CBOE:ZVOL
feed.summary: This article provides an analysis of the Volatility Premium Plus ETF (ZVOL), detailing its key statistics, investment strategy, and performance. ZVOL aims to offer a monthly income stream and inverse exposure to mid-term VIX futures, primarily as a short-term trading tool rather than a long-term investment. The ETF is structured as a commodity pool, avoids issuing K-1 forms, and pays monthly dividends, with its shares issued by Volatility Shares LLC.

feed.title: Alvotech (ALVO) TTM Profitability Challenged By Q4 US$108.5 Million Net Loss
feed.summary: Alvotech (ALVO) reported a Q4 net loss of US$108.5 million but maintained trailing twelve-month profitability at US$27.9 million. The article discusses the tension between recent quarterly losses and full-year profit, highlighting investor focus on margin sustainability and earnings stability. Valuation metrics appear attractive, yet balance sheet concerns and reliance on fluctuating revenue streams pose risks, prompting caution for investors.

feed.title: Alignment Healthcare (ALHC) CEO sells shares to cover RSU tax withholding
feed.summary: Alignment Healthcare CEO John E. Kao sold 73,046 shares of common stock at a weighted-average price of $17.84 per share. This sale was explicitly stated to cover tax withholding obligations associated with the vesting of restricted stock units (RSUs) and was not a discretionary trade. Following this transaction, Kao retains significant direct and indirect holdings in the company.

feed.title: Ventas Plummets 2.04% on Earnings Miss and Debt Woes as 270M Volume Ranks 473rd on NYSE
feed.summary: Ventas Inc. (VTR) experienced a 2.04% drop in stock price due to a significant earnings miss in Q4 2025, with EPS far below estimates and revenue also falling short. The decline was further fueled by concerns over the company's high debt burden, limited liquidity, and the sustainability of its dividend, despite institutional ownership remaining high. Analysts highlight long-term potential in healthcare real estate but caution about near-term operational and financial challenges.

feed.title: Jif releases 'simple' peanut butter spread made with just 3 ingredients
feed.summary: Jif has launched a new "simpler" peanut butter spread called "Jif Simply Creamy Unsweetened," made with only three ingredients: peanuts, salt, and palm oil. This new product aims to provide a streamlined ingredient list while maintaining the brand's signature smooth texture and nutty taste. It is currently available at Walmart and will soon be offered in more varieties and at additional national retailers.

feed.title: BetMGM ‘Optionality’ Could Be Imminent for Entain, Says Analyst
feed.summary: Jefferies analyst James Wheatcroft suggests that Entain, co-owner of BetMGM, could soon gain "standalone capability" for the joint venture, potentially by Q2 2026, which would unlock strategic flexibility. This optionality for Entain (GMVHY) has often been seen by investors as a potential divestiture of its 50% stake in BetMGM. The analyst also highlights BetMGM's advantageous stance in avoiding prediction markets, which could lead to higher EBITDA growth.

feed.title: Citigroup Inc. Trade Ideas — LSX:A1H92V
feed.summary: This article compiles various trade ideas for Citigroup Inc. (LSX:A1H92V) from different traders on TradingView. The ideas include both long and short positions, technical analysis based on patterns like bullish bats, double bottoms, Fibonacci retracements, and wave theories, as well as fundamental outlooks regarding earnings and support/resistance levels. General sentiment ranges from bullish predictions aiming for $70-$78 to bearish outlooks noting sector weakness and potential pullbacks.

feed.title: Jif releases 'simple' peanut butter spread made with just 3 ingredients
feed.summary: Jif has launched a new "Simply Creamy Unsweetened" peanut butter, featuring just three ingredients: peanuts, salt, and palm oil. This move aims to cater to consumers seeking cleaner labels while maintaining the brand's signature smooth texture and nutty taste. The product is currently available at Walmart and will soon be rolled out to other national retailers.

feed.title: A Look At MarketAxess Holdings (MKTX) Valuation Following Recent Share Price Softness
feed.summary: MarketAxess Holdings (MKTX) operates an electronic bond trading platform with annual revenue of US$846.3m and net income of US$246.6m. Despite recent share price softness, with returns of 3.76% over 7 days and 1.74% over 1 month, its 1-year total shareholder return is 18.5% and 5-year is 62.82%. The company is considered undervalued by one narrative, trading at an estimated 17% discount to its intrinsic value and below some analyst targets, with growth driven by expansion into emerging markets and Eurobonds.

feed.title: Is It Time To Reconsider Avantor (AVTR) After A 53% One Year Share Price Decline
feed.summary: Avantor (AVTR) has seen a significant 53% decline in its share price over the past year, prompting a reevaluation of its intrinsic value. A Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis suggests the stock is undervalued by 50.9% at $7.61, indicating a fair value of around $15.50 per share. Additionally, its Price/Sales ratio of 0.79x is considerably lower than the industry average, further suggesting it may be undervalued.

feed.title: Phillies 2026: New food options coming to Citizens Bank Park this season
feed.summary: Citizens Bank Park is introducing several new food and drink options for the 2026 Phillies season, including Sánchez Sliders, the Schwarbomb Sundae, and The Sweeper, with portions of proceeds benefiting various charities. New vendors like Freddy's Frozen Custard and LaScala's Fire are also featured, alongside enhanced versions of fan favorites like the 1883 Burger Co Smash Burger and the return of the 9-9-9 Challenge. These additions aim to enhance the fan experience as the Phillies prepare for their home opener against the Texas Rangers.

feed.title: Array Technologies (NASDAQ: ARRY) CEO nets shares from RSU vesting
feed.summary: Array Technologies' CEO, Kevin G. Hostetler, reported the vesting of 160,217 restricted stock units (RSUs) into common stock on March 17 and 18, 2026. The company withheld 67,052 shares to cover tax obligations, and Hostetler now directly holds 324,266 common shares. Additionally, he retains 632,287 unvested RSUs from prior grants.

feed.title: 5 High-Flying Penny Stocks to Buy

feed.title: ETFs to Tap on NVIDIA's 10-for-1 Stock Split Retail Frenzy
feed.summary: NVIDIA's upcoming 10-for-1 stock split aims to make its shares more accessible to a wider range of investors and increase liquidity. This move, coupled with the company's continuous advancements in AI chip technology and bullish analyst sentiment, is expected to further boost its growth. The article suggests several ETFs with significant NVIDIA allocation for investors looking to capitalize on this opportune moment.
